title: Electrical Wiring & Remodeling
desc: We provide safe, reliable electrical wiring and remodeling services for residential and commercial properties. From full rewiring and panel upgrades to lighting, outlets, and system repairs, our licensed team ensures all work is completed to code. We focus on safety, efficiency, and quality workmanship for renovations, upgrades, and new installations, delivering dependable results tailored to your project needs.

## Electrical Wiring Services

Electrical work in your home should always be handled by a licensed and experienced professional to ensure safety, compliance, and long-lasting results.

For over a decade, our team has been proudly serving homeowners across the Greater Toronto Area with reliable and efficient electrical services. From minor wiring repairs to full home rewiring projects, we deliver high-quality workmanship backed by strong customer service and fair, transparent pricing.

​

Whether it’s a small fix or a major electrical upgrade, you can count on us to get the job done safely and correctly the first time.

[INQUIRE TODAY](https://www.quickfast.ca/contact-us)

Electrical Rewiring

1

### Home Electrical Upgrades

![Rewiring Electrical In Your Home.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_fda72a83c25147aeb86b5bc19c5b9b07~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_223,h_223,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Rewiring%20Electrical%20In%20Your%20Home.jpg)

As modern homes rely more on advanced and smart technologies, your electrical system may need an upgrade to keep up with demand. Older panels often require replacement to safely support today’s appliances and devices.

 

Our team conducts thorough inspections to identify potential hazards and ensure your system is operating safely and efficiently. We provide dependable solutions so you can focus on what matters most.

2

### Basement Rewiring

![Electrical Wiring Repair](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_1268cd6edbb644babb3f2ce2cf8b59e0~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_223,h_223,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Electrical%20Wiring%20Repair.jpeg)

Finishing a basement is a great way to add living space and increase property value—but it often requires proper electrical upgrades. Whether you’re building a rental unit or expanding your home, we handle outlet installations, dedicated circuits for kitchens and laundry areas, and panel capacity assessments.

 

If your home still uses an outdated fuse box, we can upgrade it to a modern breaker panel for improved safety and performance.

3

### Smart Home Wiring

![Electrical Wiring Work](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/12dfec54c92d4869b1d17ffb39e85310.jpg/v1/fill/w_223,h_223,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Electrical%20Wiring%20Work.jpg)

Today’s homes demand more power and connectivity than ever before. From security systems to entertainment setups and smart appliances, we ensure your home is wired to support it all.

 

Our team specializes in smart home wiring, providing the right power distribution and setup so you can enjoy comfort, convenience, and modern living without limitations.

## A Bright Step Forward

Need a licensed electrician for wiring repairs, lighting installation, or any other electrical service? Our experienced team is ready to deliver safe, efficient, and high-quality electrical solutions across Toronto and the GTA.

​

Get in touch with us today to schedule a service or request a quote—we’re here to keep your home or business powered with confidence and care.

## Why Choose Us?

You need an electrical team that understands the demands of today’s modern homes—and delivers without delay. At QuickFast, we focus on solutions, not questions. Whether it’s interior or exterior pot light installation or a full home rewiring project, our experienced electricians are ready to support you from planning to completion.

​

Homeowners trust us for our reliability, quality workmanship, and commitment to getting the job done right the first time. From small upgrades to large-scale electrical projects, we make the process simple, efficient, and stress-free.

 

Contact QuickFast today to request a free estimate and schedule your electrical service.

Get in Touch
